title: Christmas Lights
description: Adds garlands, gifts, and various festive decorations. Merry Christmas!
body:
![minecraft_title_2](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3f473045-3ff4-4f0c-b14d-f07339d86c48)  
  
  
  

## 🎄 Christmas Decorations

**Christmas Decorations** is a festive Minecraft mod that adds a variety of holiday-themed decorative elements to bring the Christmas spirit into your world.

All decorations are designed to fit naturally into vanilla-style builds while adding a warm and joyful atmosphere. Whether you’re decorating for a winter event or just love festive details, this mod helps make your world feel alive during the holidays.
